title: Prescriptive, Trade-off or Performance Compliance
full_text:
1.1.2.1 Prescriptive, Trade-off or Performance Compliance
Prescriptive, Trade-off or Performance Compliance
(See Note A-1.1.2.1.)
1) Buildings shall comply with
  a) the prescriptive or trade-off requirements stated in Parts 3 to 7,
  b) the performance requirements stated in Part 8, or
  c) the tiered performance requirements stated in Part 10.

clauses.text: the prescriptive or trade-off requirements stated in Parts 3 to 7,
the performance requirements stated in Part 8, or
the tiered performance requirements stated in Part 10.
